notes: .github/ is protected - cannot push CI workflow changes.
PR #1432 (Delta method CI) - rebased June 2026. Only DCO check shown; awaiting maintainer CI approval.

PR #1533 (one_hot_encode index) may need closing - contributor PR #1546 with same fix was MERGED.

Recent merges (June 12-20): #1537 (method_name=None in do/refute), #1576 (do() fix), #1532 (replace Exception), #1553 (estimate_effect_naive), #1575 (GroupBy fix), #1581 (OrderedSet fix), #1563 (metric_params contributor), #1579 (one_hot_encode try/except contributor), #1546 (index preservation contributor), #1524 (GCM notebook contributor), #1585 (binary_flip bool-dtype contributor).
